title: Commonsense for Zero-Shot Natural Language Video Localization

methodology.name: CORONET
key_components: Graph Convolution Networks (GCN) for encoding commonsense information
methodology.technique: dynamically generates video segments and pseudo-query annotations

problem_addressed: existing pseudo-queries lack grounding in source video, resulting in unstructured and disjointed content
limitations_of_existing_methods: noisy pseudo-queries from object detectors and language models
missing semantic nuances when eliminating textual information
